channel.title: SPL - Columbia Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Columbia Branch

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Tuesday, April 7, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Columbia Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Columbia Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Reading with Rover
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Columbia Branch, Children's Area

Build reading skills and confidence by reading aloud to a certified therapy dog. 

Event details

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn / Caleidoscopio Juega y Aprende
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Columbia Branch

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple crafts with their caregivers during the group time.Event is in English and Spanish.---------------------------------------Los niños escuchan cuentos multilingües, cantan canciones y hacen manualidades sencillas con sus cuidadores durante el tiempo en grupo.Este evento se realizará en inglés y español.

Event details

item.title: Arts & Movement with Rec'n the Streets
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Columbia Branch

Join us for art and movement activities every week. Get creative and move your body!April's Arts & Movements events will be held outside!

Event details
